channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jane Campion's Tribute to Sam Neill: A Life of Grace and Artistry
item.description: Jane Campion, director of the acclaimed film *The Piano*, reflects on her profound relationship with actor Sam Neill, who passed away in 2026. The article details Neill's kindness, professionalism, an...

item.title: Donald Trump settles $8 million sex abuse claim with E Jean Carroll
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has paid writer E Jean Carroll approximately $8.06 million after a jury found him liable for sexually abusing and defaming her in a civil case. The payout, which includes t...

item.title: Single 6D Lotto Bettor Wins P1.249M Jackpot in PCSO Draw
item.description: A lone bettor successfully matched the exact sequence of numbers 9-9-3-2-5-4 in the PCSO's 6D Lotto draw on July 14, 2026, winning the P1.249 million jackpot prize. This marks the second major jackpot...

item.title: Spain advances to 2026 FIFA World Cup final with dominant win over France
item.description: Spain secured their place in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final with a resounding 2-0 victory against France in a match held in Texas. The European champions showcased their tactical discipline and physica...

item.title: Indigenous Leaders Condemn Federal Clean Water Bill for Undermining Hard-Won Rights
item.description: Indigenous leaders have criticized a new federal clean water bill during a meeting with the Assembly of First Nations (AFN), arguing that the legislation undermines decades of hard-won rights. The bil...

item.title: Spain advances to World Cup final with commanding victory over France
item.description: Spain delivered a dominant performance against France in a high-stakes World Cup 2026 clash, securing their place in the final with a 2-0 victory. The match, held in Texas, saw Spain suffocate France'...

item.title: FBI and US Police Deployed for Security at Argentina-England Semi-Final
item.description: The FBI and American police forces have been deployed at the Argentina vs England semi-final match, raising security concerns. This high-profile event, known for its historic rivalry, requires compreh...

item.title: Impeachment Trial: Prosecution Removes Witnesses Due to Grave Threats
item.description: The prosecution has decided to no longer present Zuleika Lopez and Belinda Bello as witnesses in the impeachment trial of President Sara Duterte. This decision comes after an assessment that the two i...

item.title: MPs approve Hillsborough Law to prevent cover-ups and ensure accountability
item.description: The UK Parliament has approved the Hillsborough Law, a significant piece of legislation aimed at preventing state cover-ups and ensuring transparency in official investigations. Prime Minister Sir Kei...

item.title: Social Media Platforms Facilitate Access to Nudify Apps, Study Reveals
item.description: A new study by the Institute for Strategic Dialogue (ISD) reveals that mainstream social media platforms like YouTube and X are inadvertently acting as gateways to nudify apps, which generate nonconse...

item.title: El Niño drought may not hit South Africa's food prices as hard as before due to better rainfall and grain stocks
item.description: The article discusses how the expected El Niño drought might impact South Africa's agriculture and food prices in 2027. While El Niño typically causes droughts in southern Africa, the 2026-27 summer c...

item.title: Pete Buttigieg criticizes Marco Rubio for lying about child deaths from aid cuts
item.description: Pete Buttigieg, former U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio's criticism for his testimony before Congress in May 2025, where Rubio claimed no children had died due to Trump's foreign aid cuts. Buttigie...

item.title: UK Introduces Social Media Curfew for 16- and 17-Year-Olds
item.description: The UK government is implementing new regulations to restrict social media use for 16- and 17-year-olds, aiming to mitigate the negative impacts of addictive features. These measures include a default...

item.title: Congress Protests Continue Amid Rahul Gandhi's Absence From CJP Rally
item.description: The article discusses Jignesh Mevani's comments on the Congress party's ongoing protests against paper leak scams, highlighting the absence of Rahul Gandhi from the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) protest...

item.title: Murder investigation into American scientist in Negros Oriental
item.description: A special task group has been established to investigate the murder of American marine biologist Kent Edward Carpenter, who was shot dead at his home in Sibulan, Negros Oriental. The 73-year-old scien...

item.title: U.S.-Iran Tensions Escalate: Trade Deals Replace Hormuz Toll, Attacks on Ships Spark Global Concern
item.description: The article details the escalating conflict between the U.S. and Iran, focusing on President Donald Trump's shift from imposing a 20% toll on ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz to pursuing tra...

item.title: Childcare worker faces 329 charges after alleged abuse of 158 children across Sydney
item.description: A parent whose children attended a childcare centre linked to accused paedophile Hamish Tait has described the situation as 'traumatic' following his arrest. Tait, 35, faces 329 charges of child abuse...

item.title: Edmonton Man Faces Assault Charges in Granville Street Incidents
item.description: Jiel Simon Uguak, 32, an Edmonton man arrested during the FIFA World Cup in Vancouver's Granville Street pedestrian zone, has had his bail hearing adjourned until next week. Uguak is accused of two co...

item.title: Costco Warns California Customers About Invasive Insect Threatening Wine Industry
item.description: Costco has issued a warning to California customers who purchased desert willow plants between June 24 and July 3, advising them to isolate suspect plants and contact county agricultural officials to ...

item.title: Trump Reverses Hormuz Shipping Fee Plan Amid Gulf Lobbying
item.description: President Donald Trump has reversed his controversial plan to impose a 20% fee on commercial tankers navigating the Strait of Hormuz, following intense lobbying from Gulf allies. The decision comes ju...
